subcodes.first_line: O twin stars of the East, beloved companions! Happy are ye that have received a ray from the celestial Sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو اختر خاور یار مهربان خوشا بحال شما که پرتوی از آفتاب آسمانی یافتید و
subcodes.subjects: @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
